title: OKE: Exec and Node Escape
description: Detects Kubernetes pod exec and host namespace access patterns that can lead to OKE worker node compromise.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Span Attributes' like '*subresource=exec*' or 'Process Command Line' like '*kubectl exec*' or 'Process Command Line' like '*nsenter*' or 'MITRE Technique ID' = 'T1609') | stats count as Events, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, unique('Process Command Line') as Commands by 'Attack Stage', 'Host Name', 'Security Severity', 'Service Name' | sort -Events

ask_ai_prompts: Determine whether pod exec activity led to host namespace access or worker-node compromise.
